Ed Ludlow has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Macklem Says Bank Capital Rule Change Alone Won’t Spark Lending

title_cn: 阿根廷第一季度经济增长超预期
summary: Economic growth in Argentina proved resilient in the first quarter, surpassing expectations even as unemployment rose and wages trailed inflation.

title: We Can't Use The Strategic Petroleum Reserve For Political Purposes Says Mike Sommers

summary: Mike Sommers, president of the American Petroleum Institute, joined Balance of Power to discuss the American Energy Security Framework. Sommers said the nation's Strategic Petroleum Reserve is "in desperate need of upgrading." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Natural Gas Drops on Cooler Outlooks, New Pipeline Capacity
title_cn: 由于前景降温和新增管道产能，美国天然气价格下跌
summary: US natural gas futures declined as forecasts shifted to show cooler weather in the coming weeks, suggesting a decline in demand for gas-fired electricity as consumers pull back on using air-conditioners. Kinder Morgan’s Gulf Coast Express pipeline expansion project also entered service, indicating more gas will be moving out of the oversupplied Permian Basin into surrounding regions instead of being flared.

title: Trump Call for Crop Sales to Iran Adds Cautious Hope for Farmers

title: Trump Says Iran’s Unfrozen Funds to Remain Under US Control

title: How Eli Lilly’s CEO Plans to Defeat Pharma’s Boom-Bust Cycle
title_cn: 礼来公司首席执行官计划如何击败制药公司的繁荣-萧条周期
summary:
When Dave Ricks became chief executive officer of Eli Lilly & Co. in 2017, he was facing an industry under siege. 

Americans held drug companies in lower esteem than airlines, law firms and even the federal government. President Donald Trump, then starting his first term, was excoriating them for their high prices. A mounting number of reports showed that soaring costs were even forcing some diabetics to ration insulin. Ricks, the 11th CEO in Lilly’s 150-year history, concedes that one was a public-relations nightmare.

Almost a decade later, the mood at Lilly has shifted dramatically. The company’s hit diabetes shot, Mounjaro, and obesity shot, Zepbound, have transformed its fortunes and, in many ways, its public image. We speak with Madison Muller, Bloomberg News Healthcare Reporter, for a closer look. (Source: Bloomberg)

Currency traders brace for potential yen intervention. Plus, Apollo caps withdrawals from a major private credit fund as redemption pressures build. And America's nuclear renaissance accelerates. Oklo Co-Founder and CEO Jake DeWitte joins Bloomberg Open Interest on the race to power the AI boom with next-generation reactors. (Source: Bloomberg)

We also speak with venture capital investors on opportunities and challenges of investing in the continent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Quantum Computing Is Finally Here. But What Is It?
title_cn: 量子计算终于来了。但这是什么？
summary: Four decades ago, physicists were theorizing that the mind-bending mechanics of quantum physics could be harnessed to make a new kind of computer that’s exponentially more powerful than conventional machines. A series of breakthroughs has now brought “quantum utility” closer to reality. A race is on to develop machines that are accurate enough to faithfully model the behavior of complex real-world phenomena and deliver a leap forward in fields as varied as drug development, financial modeling an

title: SpaceX Wavers Near $2 Trillion Market Cap After 3-Day Rout | Bloomberg Tech 6/23/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 市值在经历了 3 天的暴跌后摇摇欲坠，接近 2 万亿美元彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 23 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down why SpaceX shares are feeling a gravitational pull as Musk's company launches its debut bond sale. Plus, tech stocks sell off worldwide as Wall Street gets an AI wake-up call. And, Menlo Ventures partner Venky Ganesan joins after the firm raises its biggest fund ever with $3 billion to back AI startups. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Draws $89 Billion Demand for Debut Bond Offering
title_cn: SpaceX 首次债券发行吸引了 890 亿美元的需求
summary:
SpaceX has drawn about $89 billion of demand for its debut US bond sale, according to people with knowledge of the matter, setting the stage for one of the biggest deals in the US investment-grade market this year.

Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI conglomerate is seeking to raise between $20 billion and $25 billion from the five-tranche offering in a deal that’s expected to price on Tuesday. At the lower of that range, demand would exceed the bond size by more than four times. Debt investors, who tend to be more conservative than those in the equity market, are betting on Musk’s ability to deliver on his promises even as the company is projected to burn significant amounts of cash over the next few years.

For more, we speak with Robert Schiffman, Senior Tech Credit Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Siemens CEO on Industrial AI's Future
title_cn: 西门子首席执行官谈工业人工智能的未来
summary: AI is moving beyond chatbots and onto the factory floor, helping manufacturers boost productivity. Siemens CEO Roland Busch joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss the trend and AI's role in Europe's industrial future. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Debuts Glasses Under Its Own Brand
title_cn: Meta 推出自有品牌眼镜
summary: Meta, which helped popularize smart glasses through partnerships with Ray-Ban and Oakley, is going down-market by launching lower-priced models under its own brand for the first time. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Menlo Ventures' Ganesan on Anthropic Bet, Backing AI Startups
title_cn: Menlo Ventures 的 Ganesan 押注 Anthropic，支持人工智能初创公司
summary: Menlo Ventures has raised $3 billion for new AI investments, the biggest fundraise in the firm's 50-year history, reflecting how dramatically venture capital is changing as investors race to back the next generation of AI winners. Menlo Ventures partner Venky Ganesan joins Bloomberg's Natasha Mascarenhas and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: SpaceX shares rose Tuesday, on track to snap a three-day selloff that wiped more than $600 billion from the Elon Musk-led rocket and satellite company’s market value.

title: Cyber Firm Varonis Weighs Sale After Takeover Interest
title_cn: 网络公司 Varonis 考虑在收购后出售
summary: Cybersecurity company Varonis Systems Inc. is exploring options including a potential sale after receiving takeover interest, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Tech Selloff Starts With Korean Chipmakers and Continues Into US Session
title_cn: 科技股抛售从韩国芯片制造商开始，并持续到美国市场
summary: A global rout in tech stocks began in Asia where a selloff in Korean chipmakers stoked concerns about the sustainability of the artificial-intelligence driven rally. Bloomberg's Carmen Reinicke reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Eli Lilly Became a $1 Trillion Company
title_cn: 礼来公司 (Eli Lilly) 如何成为价值 1 万亿美元的公司
summary: Mounjaro and Zepbound turned Eli Lilly into a trillion-dollar pharmaceutical giant. But every blockbuster drug eventually faces competition. Here’s what Lilly is doing to stay on top. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Sees 6 Billion Reasons for New Levy on Online Shoppers
title_cn: 欧盟认为有 60 亿个理由对网购者征收新税
summary: Bargain-hunting consumers across the European Union will start feeling the pinch of higher online shopping costs next week when a new levy primarily targeting China comes into force, adding a layer of trade friction between the two economies.

title: AI is Most Transformative Technology of our Times Says Former SEC Chair Gary Gensler
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会前主席加里·詹斯勒 (Gary Gensler) 表示，人工智能是我们这个时代最具变革性的技术
summary:
Former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler says AI leaders and hyperscalers need to generate meaningful revenue and productivity gains to meet current market conditions. 
He spoke with Paul Sweeney and Tom Keene on Bloomberg Surveillance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MGX’s $50 Billion Raise Sets Up One of the Biggest AI Funds Ever
title_cn: MGX 筹集 500 亿美元，设立有史以来最大的人工智能基金之一
summary: Abu Dhabi’s MGX has raised close to $50 billion from regional and global investors to accelerate spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure and technology, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Trump’s Pennsylvania Visit Teases a Midterms Shift
title_cn: 特朗普的宾夕法尼亚之行预示着中期选举的转变
summary: Republicans were promised that the president would stump for them.

title: US Senate Votes to End Iran War in Rebuke to Trump
title_cn: 美国参议院投票结束伊朗战争以谴责特朗普
summary: The Republican-led Senate voted for the first time to end the US war with Iran, breaking with President Donald Trump on an unpopular foreign conflict that has raised Americans’ cost of living, roiled markets and caused global economic fallout.

title: Slain Dissident’s Daughter Maps Out a Plan for Cuba After Communism
title_cn: 被杀持不同政见者的女儿为共产主义后的古巴制定了计划
summary: Rosa María Payá was 23 when her father died on his way to a pro-democracy meeting. With Donald Trump’s help, she’s now hoping to complete his mission.

title: Trump Says Iran’s Unfrozen Funds to Remain Under US Control
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗未冻结资金仍处于美国控制之下
summary: President Donald Trump said Iran will only be able to use funds released from frozen accounts to purchase food and medical supplies from the US, seeking to ease concerns about peace negotiations that both sides say are making progress.

title: Trump Vows Economy to Rebound as Iran Price Shocks Reverberate
title_cn: 特朗普誓言经济将在伊朗物价震荡回响之际反弹
summary: President Donald Trump touted his protectionist trade agenda to voters in the battleground state of Pennsylvania, turning his attention to the US economy following an interim deal to end the war with Iran.

title: Romania in Last-Ditch Push to Form Cabinet After Vote Fails
title_cn: 投票失败后罗马尼亚正在最后努力组建内阁
summary: Romanian President Nicusor Dan urged political parties to agree swiftly on support for a minority government to end weeks of turmoil that have stalled key reforms for crucial European Union funding.

title: NYC Heads to Polls With Democrats Split Over Age, AI, Israel
title_cn: 纽约市即将举行民意调查，民主党人在年龄、人工智能、以色列问题上存在分歧
summary: New York City is experiencing a highly contested Congressional primary season with a number of hotly contested races. The primaries will test the political strength of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, who has endorsed several insurgent candidates against Democratic stalwarts, and will speak to demographic and generational shifts within the party. Daniel Squadron, former New York State Senator (D) and co-founder of The States Project, author of the new book "The Fourth Branch" joins to discuss on Balance of Power.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Grants Iran Football Team Extra Day Before World Cup Match
title_cn: 美国在世界杯比赛前为伊朗足球队提供额外一天的补助
summary: The Iranian national team will be granted an extra day in the US to prepare for its upcoming World Cup match, a Department of Homeland Security spokesperson said, the latest in an ongoing back and forth between the football team and its hosts.

title: Trump Administration, Qatar Say EU Methane Rules Threaten Energy Security
title_cn: 特朗普政府和卡塔尔称欧盟甲烷规则威胁能源安全
summary: The US, Qatar and other natural gas exporters are urging the European Union to ease some of its pending methane emissions rules, warning that the regulations could threaten the bloc’s energy security.

title: Italy Seeks to Mend Ties With the US After Trump-Meloni Blowout
title_cn: 特朗普-梅洛尼井喷后意大利寻求修复与美国的关系
summary: Italy’s Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani sought to mend fences with the US, saying the two countries should work to de-escalate tensions after a spat between President Donald Trump and Premier Giorgia Meloni.

title: US Sanctions Key Cuban Bank, Miner in Fresh Blow to Havana
title_cn: 美国制裁古巴主要银行和矿业公司对哈瓦那造成新打击
summary: The US sanctioned the Cuban military’s international banking arm and a state-run company that’s partnered with Trafigura Group and other miners, in the latest escalation of pressure against Havana’s communist leadership.

title: Welfare Fraud Costs UK £10 Billion as Burnham Vows Crackdown
title_cn: 伯纳姆发誓严厉打击福利欺诈，英国损失100亿英镑
summary: Fraud and error in the UK welfare system is costing the taxpayer £10 billion ($13 billion) a year, according to analysis by the government’s budget watchdog.

title: Trump Fast Deportation Rule Cleared by Appeals Court for Now
title_cn: 上诉法院暂时批准特朗普快速驱逐出境规则
summary: A divided US appeals court lifted a temporary hold on a Trump administration policy that allows federal agents to rapidly remove undocumented immigrants without due process from anywhere in the US if they can’t quickly prove they’ve been in the country for more than two years.

title: Six Arrested for Alleged Reflecting Pool Damage, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称六人因涉嫌破坏倒影池而被捕
summary: President Donald Trump said that six people have been arrested for allegedly damaging the Lincoln Memorial’s Reflecting Pool, which has been plagued by algae and peeling paint after a renovation that he directed.

title: NY’s Pension Chief Faces First Democratic Challengers Since 2007
title_cn: 纽约养老金局长自 2007 年以来首次面临民主党挑战者
summary: New York Comptroller Thomas DiNapoli, who oversees the state’s $300 billion pension fund, is facing his first primary challenge since taking office nearly two decades ago as two rival Democrats try to seize on the progressive energy that propelled Mayor Zohran Mamdani to victory in November.

title: Canada Backs $504 Million Loan for Indigenous Nuclear Stake
title_cn: 加拿大支持为本土核股权提供 5.04 亿美元贷款
summary: Canada will make a C$715 million ($504 million) loan guarantee to a group of seven First Nations so they can buy a stake in a large nuclear project east of Toronto.

title: Supreme Court Revives $1 Billion Exxon Suit Over Cuba Assets
title_cn: 最高法院重启埃克森美孚针对古巴资产的 10 亿美元诉讼
summary: The Supreme Court sided with Exxon Mobil in its efforts to sue a Cuban conglomerate for operating oil and gas assets seized in 1960 following the country’s Communist Revolution.

title: Israel Weighs US IPO for Multi-Billion-Dollar Defense Companies
title_cn: 以色列考虑让价值数十亿美元的国防公司在美国首次公开募股
summary: Israel is considering listing state-owned defense giants Israel Aerospace Industries Ltd. and Rafael Advanced Defense Systems Ltd. in the US to potentially avoid stricter disclosure obligations in the local market.

title: Starmer Plan on Defense Investment Sets Up Tension With Burnham
title_cn: 斯塔默国防投资计划与伯纳姆关系紧张
summary: Outgoing UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is pushing ahead with a controversial plan to increase defense spending, setting up potential tensions with the man most likely to succeed him, former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham.

title: Meloni Considers Calling Italian Election as Soon as April
title_cn: 梅洛尼考虑最早在四月举行意大利大选
summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni is weighing the possibility of holding Italy’s next general election as soon as April, months ahead of the legal deadline before the end of 2027, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Historical Tensions Mar Ukraine Recovery Push in Poland
title_cn: 历史紧张局势三月乌克兰复苏推动波兰
summary: Historical grievances are threatening to derail an annual Ukraine reconstruction conference in Poland and undermine ties with one of the war-torn country’s most important European allies.

title: Armenia to Attend Ukraine Forum as Russia Targets Its Exports
title_cn: 俄罗斯瞄准其出口，亚美尼亚将参加乌克兰论坛
summary: Armenia is sending a top security official to the Ukraine Recovery Conference, underscoring Yerevan’s tilt away from Russia as Moscow continues to step up economic pressure on its longtime ally.

title: Former Fed Chairman Alan Greenspan Dies at 100
title_cn: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
summary:
Alan Greenspan has died at the age of 100. He served as Fed chief for 18 years, from 1987 to 2006, and was credited with guiding a record US economic expansion, but his legacy was later dimmed by the financial crisis that erupted in 2008. Greenspan died on June 22 at his home due to complications of Parkinson's disease. Bloomberg's David Westin looks back at his accomplishments. 

Correct: This video has been edited and reuploaded to reflect that Alan Greenspan left the Fed 20 years ago. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Sends Ships to Persian Gulf for First Time Since February
title_cn: 印度自二月以来首次向波斯湾派遣船只
summary: India has sent two ships back to the Persian Gulf for the first time since February this year and they have crossed the Strait of Hormuz, Randhir Jaiswal, spokesperson for the country’s Ministry of External Affairs, told reporters in New Delhi.

title: Trump Is Giving Away Too Much to Iran With MOU, Hochstein Says
title_cn: 霍赫斯坦表示，特朗普通过谅解备忘录向伊朗做出了太多让步
summary: Amos Hochstein, TWG Global managing partner and former to energy advisor to President Joe Biden, says President Donald Trump has given Iran a "huge political win" and the memorandum of understanding it signed with the US is "like a surrender." He also talks about Iranian oil hitting the market again on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Oil Exports Hit 2026 High as Iran Waiver Threatens Sales
title_cn: 由于伊朗豁免威胁销售，俄罗斯石油出口创 2026 年新高
summary: Tumbling oil prices after the interim US-Iran peace deal are eating into Moscow’s windfall

title: Army Sets One-Year Deadline to Start Making Cheap Interceptors
title_cn: 陆军设定一年期限开始制造廉价拦截机
summary: US Army Secretary Dan Driscoll wants defense companies to develop cheaper air-defense interceptors within a year, part of a bid to upend decades of weapons-development inertia and fix shortcomings exposed by the wars in Ukraine and Iran.

title: Europe Has $200 Billion Treasury Leverage Over US, Study Argues
title_cn: 研究称，欧洲的国债杠杆超过美国 2000 亿美元
summary: Europe’s outsized holdings of US Treasuries give it significant sway in any future standoff with President Donald Trump, according to new research.

title: Merz Backs Pension Plan That Channels €30 Billion to Markets
title_cn: 默茨支持向市场输送 300 亿欧元的养老金计划
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz said Germany will consider a new mandatory pension contribution that would funnel at least €30 billion ($34.2 billion) a year into a capital-market fund as part of a broad effort to shore up the country’s retirement system.
